success.title: Message Sent

diagnostic.title: Skills Diagnostic
diagnostic.intro: Answer a few questions to discover offshore wind career pathways that fit your background.

stems.experience: How much experience do you have in the offshore wind or broader energy sector?
stems.background: Which of the following best describes your current background?
stems.interests: Which areas of offshore wind work interest you most?
stems.safetyTraining: Which safety qualifications do you already hold?
stems.technicalSkills: Rate your confidence with technical problem-solving.
stems.digitalSkills: Rate your confidence with digital tools and data analysis.
stems.mobility: Are you able to travel or relocate for work?
stems.education: What is the highest level of education you have completed?
stems.languages: Which languages do you work in professionally?
stems.timeCommitment: How much time per week can you commit to training?

skillsBridge.title: Skills Bridge
skillsBridge.subtitle: Already working in another industry? See which of your existing skills transfer to this role and what you'll need to develop.
skillsBridge.noMatch: No direct skill matches found for this sector.
skillsBridge.fullMatch: Great news — your skills fully cover this role!
